creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
FreeBSD 6.2 lacks in a suitable driver for the common sound card Soundblaster
Audigy SE (pciconf -lv

none12@pci4:7:0:        class=0x040100 card=0x100a1102 chip=0x00071102 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
    vendor   = 'Creative Labs'
    device   = 'CA0106-DAT Audigy LS'
    class    = multimedia
    subclass = audio
)

It would be nice if this sound card could get a focus in development.
